economic_notes: Nation operates Tl'etinqox Gas Bar (gas and grocery retail). GBEs include Klatassine Resources Ltd., Klatassine Resources LLP (equipment rental), Dechen Ventures Ltd., Dechen Ventures LP (forestry), and BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Community impacted by wildfires in summer 2017 with ongoing wildfire receivables.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2020. Auditor is Beswick Hildebrandt Lund CPA of Prince George, BC. Prior year (2019) was audited by a different auditor. Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Klatassine Resources Ltd., Klatassine Resources LLP, Dechen Ventures Ltd., Dechen Ventures LP, and BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Ongoing wildfire receivables from 2017 wildfire with allowance for doubtful accounts of $273,611. Accumulated surplus per Note 11 is $19,701,514 (includes operating surplus, equity in TCA, and equity in government trust) but statement of operations shows $18,827,345 — discrepancy likely due to reclassification. Net financial debt end of year is $1,233,461. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $6,703,810 + FNHA $2,191,965 + Province of BC $1,001,260 + Government of Canada $120,030 + FNESC $642,674 = $10,659,739. OSR = $14,816,410 - $10,659,739 = $4,156,671 (includes Gas Bar, rental, other revenue, CCATEC, interest, equity earnings/losses).
